zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew de Neville於1228年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾皮可爾時，他的父親Jollan de Neville41歲，母親Maud Beauchamp34歲。他於1254年與Alice Of Pickhill在英國英格蘭越可爾皮可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1295年9月23日之前在英國越可爾皮可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Andrew de Neville于1228年出生在英国英格兰越可爾皮可爾时，他的父亲Jollan de Neville41岁，母亲Maud Beauchamp34岁。他于1254年与Alice Of Pickhill在英国英格兰越可爾皮可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1295年9月23日之前在英国越可爾皮可爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevells
meanings: Irish: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevils
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Novel
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .
Catalan: variant of   Novell  .

variants.name: Newell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .
English: variant of   Noel  .
English: variant of   Newhall  .

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew de Neville was born in 1228, in Pickhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Jollan de Neville, was 41 and his mother, Maud Beauchamp, was 34. He married Alice Of Pickhill in 1254, in Pickhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died before 23 September 1295, in Pickhill, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andrew de Neville est né en 1228, à Pickhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Jollan de Neville, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Maud Beauchamp, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Alice Of Pickhill en 1254, à Pickhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 23 septembre 1295, à Pickhill, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Andrew de Neville 1228 in Pickhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jollan de Neville 41 und seine Mutter Maud Beauchamp 34. Er hat 1254 in Pickhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Of Pickhill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 23. September 1295 in Pickhill, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew de Neville è nato il nel 1228 nel Pickhill, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Jollan de Neville, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Maud Beauchamp, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Alice Of Pickhill nel 1254, nel Pickhill, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 23 settembre 1295, nel Pickhill, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Andrew de Nevilleが1228年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアピックヒルで生まれた時，父Jollan de Nevilleは41歳，母Maud Beauchampは34歳であった。1254年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアピックヒルでAlice Of Pickhillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1295年9月23日以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアピックヒルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Andrew de Neville(이)가 1228년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 피크힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jollan de Neville(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Beauchamp(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1254년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 피크힐에서 Alice Of Pickhill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1295년 9월 23일 이전 영국 요르크실르 피크힐에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew de Neville nasceu em 1228, em Pickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Jollan de Neville, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Maud Beauchamp, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Of Pickhill em 1254, em Pickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 23 de setembro de 1295, em Pickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew de Neville родился в 1228 г. в местности пиккхилл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Jollan de Neville было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Maud Beauchamp, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Of Pickhill в 1254 г. в местности пиккхилл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 23 сентябрь 1295 г. в местности пиккхилл, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Andrew de Neville nació en 1228, en Pickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Jollan de Neville, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Maud Beauchamp, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Alice Of Pickhill en 1254, en Pickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 23 de septiembre de 1295, en Pickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
